Metadata.title: CODARI — IT & Engineering Recruiting | DACH
Metadata.description: Your recruitment partner for IT & Engineering in the DACH region. Find top talent and strengthen your employer brand.

Home.heroTitle: Your Recruitment Partner for IT & Engineering
Home.heroSub: Specialized recruitment consulting and employer branding in the DACH region — for companies that want to attract and retain talent.
Home.itRecruitingDesc: Software developers, cloud architects, AI specialists, DevOps engineers, and more IT professionals for your company.
Home.engineeringRecruitingDesc: PLC programmers, electrical designers, service technicians, EMSR technicians, and mechanical engineers for your projects.
Home.executiveSearchDesc: C-level and senior leadership positions in IT and engineering — filled discreetly and with precision.
Home.employerBrandingDesc: From EVP development to campaigns and retention — your employer brand as a competitive advantage.
Home.netzwerkDesc: With offices in Düsseldorf and Krefeld and an international network, we connect companies with the best talent worldwide.
Home.step1Desc: Get to know us and share your requirements in a no-obligation first meeting.
Home.step2Desc: Together we analyze your needs and develop a tailored recruiting strategy.
Home.step3Desc: We identify and qualify the best candidates from our network.
Home.step4Desc: Support until successful hiring — including onboarding assistance.
Home.vertrauenText: Since our founding, we combine deep industry knowledge with personal consulting. Our focus is on long-term partnerships, not quick placements.
Home.ctaText: Let us find the right talent for your company together.

FurUnternehmen.metaDescription: Find skilled professionals in IT and engineering. Permanent or freelance — CODARI matches precisely.
FurUnternehmen.introText: We place skilled professionals and executives in IT, Engineering, and Executive Search — for permanent positions and project-based assignments. Through precise pre-qualification and perfect matching, we find the right specialists for your company.
FurUnternehmen.festanstellungDesc: Strengthen your team with carefully selected specialists. We emphasize cultural fit and use advanced matching technologies along with industry expertise for lasting employee relationships.
FurUnternehmen.freelancerDesc: Access to highly qualified independent experts for short-term support or specialized knowledge. Our freelancers bring immediate value to your projects.
FurUnternehmen.itText: In a world of rapid technological change, we support you with the right IT specialists. From software development to cloud architecture — our matching service evolves continuously.
FurUnternehmen.engineeringText: Qualified engineers and technicians for your industrial requirements. From automation to mechanical engineering — we find the right experts.
FurUnternehmen.executiveText: Discreet and targeted placement of leadership positions in IT and engineering. We identify candidates who strategically advance your company.
FurUnternehmen.netzwerkText: Our international network enables us to identify and recruit the best talent worldwide — with a focus on the DACH region.
FurUnternehmen.kontaktText: Please contact us directly via email or phone.

FurKandidaten.metaTitle: For Candidates — Careers in IT & Engineering
FurKandidaten.metaDescription: Career opportunities in IT and engineering. CODARI connects professionals with top employers in the DACH region.
FurKandidaten.heroSub: Explore your career opportunities in dynamic and forward-thinking industries
FurKandidaten.fachkraefteText: IT and engineering are experiencing a persistent talent shortage. This offers qualified professionals excellent opportunities to actively shape their careers and move into positions that match their skills and ambitions.
FurKandidaten.innovateDesc: Given rapid technological progress, STEM professionals are in demand worldwide. Use your expertise to become part of the next technological revolution.
FurKandidaten.leadDesc: The current market allows professionals to actively shape their job search and careers. Global opportunities provide a springboard to a secure professional future.
FurKandidaten.ctaTitle: Ready for Your Next Career Move?
FurKandidaten.ctaText: Discover our current job openings and find your next challenge.

EmployerBranding.metaTitle: Employer Branding — Strengthen Your Employer Brand
EmployerBranding.metaDescription: Employer branding strategies from EVP to campaigns. Build your employer brand and attract top talent.
EmployerBranding.heroSub: The success factor for companies with vision
EmployerBranding.portfolioText: CODARI's service portfolio meets individual business requirements and offers industry-leading solutions.
EmployerBranding.portfolio1: Employer Branding audits, campaigns, and measures
EmployerBranding.service1Desc: We specialize in designing and implementing customized HR processes. From analytical review to optimized procedure implementation, we guide you every step.
EmployerBranding.service2Desc: Our all-in-one solution lets you focus on your core business. We handle administrative tasks and increase employee satisfaction.
EmployerBranding.service3Desc: Tailored development and training solutions to unlock your employees' full potential and establish a sustainable learning culture.
EmployerBranding.service4Desc: Comprehensive support from analysis to implementation and evaluation. Focus on communication measures and market visibility of your employer brand.
EmployerBranding.ctaText: Let us develop your employer branding strategy together.

UberUns.metaDescription: CODARI combines IT & engineering recruiting with employer branding expertise. Learn how we strengthen companies in the DACH region.
UberUns.geschichteText: CODARI positions itself as a trusted partner and innovator in IT and engineering recruitment. Our holistic approach to talent acquisition, HR services, and employer branding promotes long-term satisfaction and sustainably strengthens companies.
UberUns.beginnText1: CODARI's story begins with two colleagues whose strong synergy and shared successes in building companies laid the foundation. Driven by the vision of offering innovative solutions, they founded CODARI.
UberUns.beginnText2: Today, we support companies in strengthening their teams with the best IT and engineering talent. Our experience and network are the foundation of your success.
UberUns.zukunftText: CODARI plans to expand by integrating the latest technological advances and market trends. Our focus is on innovation and our clients' success. We continuously evolve our services to meet the changing demands of the IT and engineering market.

Kontakt.metaDescription: Free consultation for IT & engineering recruiting and employer branding. Offices in Düsseldorf and Krefeld.
Kontakt.formDisabled: This form is currently not functional. Please contact us directly via email at {email} or by phone at {phone}.
